title: S7: Authority Bounding + Restriction Propagation Through Composition
intent: Enforce governance invariants through composition chains. Without this, the DAG from S6 is structural only — nothing prevents authority escalation through transitive dependencies. This sprint implements: authority bounding (A→B requires Authority(A) ⊇ RequestedCapability(B)), restriction propagation (intrinsic restrictions compose monotonically through the DAG), and I6 extension for transitive delegation non-escalation. End-to-end tests validate multi-module scenarios through the full gate pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: [MIGRATION] Define acceptance criteria for this packet
